title: Create Order (Payroll Management)
acceptanceCriteria: Customer can perform "Create Order" only when business rules and validations for Payroll are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
Create Order attempted with missing/invalid required fields
Create Order attempted by a role without permission
Create Order attempted on a record in an incompatible status
businessRules: order total must equal sum of line items plus tax minus discount
stock/availability must be checked before confirming the order
payment must succeed before fulfillment begins
cannot dispatch an order that has not been paid (unless COD)
refund amount must not exceed the original payment
delivery address is mandatory for physical fulfillment

workflow.stateTransition: order total must equal sum of line items plus tax minus discount | stock/availability must be checked before confirming the order | payment must succeed before fulfillment begins | cannot dispatch an order that has not been paid (unless COD) | refund amount must not exceed the original payment | delivery address is mandatory for physical fulfillment

business.reason: Supports the Order-Fulfillment Workflow business pattern for "Payroll Management": Create Order is a mandatory lifecycle step - without it the module cannot transition to the next state.
